name: "the" Cheese Ball
directions: Mix all ingerdients together, plop on a plate and form into a ball using wax paper over the top.
Refrigerate 30 minutes or until hardened a bit.
Serve with crackers.
Triscuits work the best(I like the new Rosemary and Olive Oil triscuits), other crackers sometimes break.

name: Devinely Skinny Coleslaw
directions: Put the vinegar, splenda, and salad dressing in a bowl and whip with your wire whisk until smooth.
This will take a few minutes Add in the Salt and Celery Seeds, stir gently and pour over your favorite cabbage mix.
This recipe is 0 weight watcher points if you use Cabbage, Carrots, and a bit of onion, or some other 0 point vegetables.

name: Vegetable Pizza
directions: Spread crescent rolls flat on an ungreased cookie sheet for the crust.
Bake as directed.
Combine cream cheese, mayonnaise, and dressing mix.
Spread on cooled crust.
Clean vegetables, chop and mix together.
Sprinkle dill weed on dressing mixture.
Spread vegetables over dressing mixture.
Chill and serve.

name: Homemade Wonton Skin
directions: Sift all the dry ingredients together.
Beat the egg with water and a few drops of yellow food colouring.
Add to the flour.
Mix it with a big metal spoon.
Dust the working surface with flour.
Knead the dough.
Divide the dough into 4 portions.
Roll out to the desired thinness and then cut them into 3 inch squares for wantons or use a three inch cookie cutter for Siu Mai.
Wrap the skins and store in the freezer for several weeks.

name: Spinach Dip for Get-Togethers
directions: mix all ingredients together except the bread.
let spinach mixture set to blend flavours.
for the bread, slice horizontally, 1/3 off the top of the loaf.
Tear bread into approximately 1-2" pieces.
Pull out the rest of the bread from the inside of the loaf until you have a'bowl'.
pour spinach mixture into bowl.
place on platter with pieces of bread surrounding bowl.
take pieces of bread and scoop up the dip and pop into mouth.
Now this is heaven!

name: Layered Shrimp Dip
directions: Soften cream cheese and mix together with mayonnaise.
Spread this mixture evenly onto the bottom of the serving platter.
Layer with cocktail sauce, then mozzarella cheese, followed by baby shrimp, and finally green onions and black olives.
Chill for at least 30 minutes prior to serving.
